message.content:
# SUBAGENT TASK: TASK-011

## CONTEXT
You are a subagent with NO MEMORY of previous sessions.
This project is MMS (Metro Maintenance Scheduler).
You are extracting knowledge about SPECIFIC VERSIONS that were validated.

## OBJECTIVE
Extract information about package versions that were TESTED and their results.

## INPUT FILE
/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/genesis/attempt6202/chats/conversations.jsonl

## WHAT TO LOOK FOR
- "npm install" or "bun add" commands with versions
- Compatibility error messages
- Versions that worked vs failed
- Version combinations tested

## EXTRACTION RULES
1. Focus on TEST EVIDENCE (not just mentions)
2. Record:
   - Package + version
   - Result (success/error)
   - Specific error if any
   - Combination with other packages

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Save to: /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-011.jsonl

Each JSONL line:
{"task_id": "TASK-011", "timestamp": "2026-01-06T...", "package": "...", "version": "...", "test_result": "success|error", "error_message": "...", "combined_with": ["pkg@ver"], "source_line": 1234}

## RESTRICTIONS
- DO NOT execute code
- DO NOT install packages
- ONLY read and extract
- Use Write tool to save the JSONL output file

content.text:
I've read the instructions. I understand this is attempt #6+ and why previous attempts failed. My first action will be to read the conversations.jsonl file to extract package version information that was tested, focusing on test evidence with success/error results.
